t_ch: 你的朋友有没有替你分担？
t_en: Did your friends help you?

t_ch: 是啊，你们几位都是放生帮的成员，一方有难，总不见得大家都不闻不管吧？
t_en: Since we are all members of the Unshackled, surely they did something when you were in trouble, right?

t_ch: 呸，冬妮娅和希斯曼那两个伪善的家伙！我要他们一起替我认缴罚款，他们说什么也不干！
t_en: Oh, please! Tonya and Heathmann are just hypocrites! They refused to pay when I asked them to share the fine!

t_ch: 当初说好要一起修善心、行善举的朋友，一出事就揭下伪善的面具了！
t_en: When we first met each other, we promised to do good together. Now, they've finally shown their true colors!

t_ch: 不知这两个白痴到底怎么会被说服的。这机械生物能是植物吗？你说那个希斯曼到底是怎么想的？
t_en: I wonder how those two idiots were convinced. Can a mechanical creature be counted as a plant? What was going through Heathmann's head?

t_ch: 还有那个冬妮娅，就这家伙最气人了…要不是她执着于放什么「猛兽」，你们怎么会找来这些会爆炸的机械宝宝？
t_en: Tonya is the worst... If she hadn't insisted on releasing beasts, you wouldn't have brought those explosive mechanical things here!

t_ch: 消消气，消消气！大家不都是丰饶之道的践行者嘛，以和为贵……
t_en: Take it easy! Aren't all of you the practitioners of the way of Abundance? Peace and harmony are priceless...

t_ch: 以和为贵，我呸！我一定要让那两个家伙付出代价，让他们好好偿还我的巨额损失。还有你们俩，走着瞧……
t_en: Peace? Forget about it! I'll make them pay for the loss I've suffered. And the two of you. Just you wait...

t_ch: 多年积蓄泡汤了…这以后的日子可怎么过啊…一边去，别烦我！
t_en: My savings are all gone... What should I do now... Now, get out of my way!

t_ch: 哎哟，冬妮娅，你怎么受了这么重的伤啊！
t_en: Holy moly, Tonya! How did you get so badly injured?

t_ch: 我…我在等丹鼎司的救护星槎…这个全身粉碎性骨折……
t_en: I... I'm waiting for the rescue starskiff of the Alchemy Commission... I have fractures all over my body...

t_ch: 就那个大铁胖子…叫什么来着…「灰熊」！我把它放生了以后，它又跟着我回了家，给了我一个结结实实的拥抱……
t_en: It was the doing of that huge automaton... the one called Grizzly! After I released it, it followed me to my home and gave me a tight embrace...

t_ch: 人家灰熊知恩图报嘛！这不是回来给您报恩来了嘛！
t_en: Grizzly never forgets every favor it receives! It did that to return your kindness!

t_ch: 有*仙舟粗口*这么报恩的吗！咳咳咳咳咳咳……
t_en: Do people actually *Xianzhou profanity* repay favors like this!? *coughs*

t_ch: 哎…伤员躺好，别激动别激动……
t_en: Alas... Why don't you lie down and stay calm...

t_ch: 这事得怪我们。
t_en: We're to blame for this.

t_ch: 没错，要不是你们两个王八蛋找来这种鬼东西…我又怎么会……
t_en: Exactly. If you two scoundrels hadn't brought me this cursed heap of metal, I wouldn't have...

t_ch: 这可不怪我们。
t_en: This isn't our fault.

t_ch: 呸…呸…赔钱！要不是你们两个王八蛋找来这种鬼东西…我又怎么会……
t_en: P—Pay... Pay for my loss! If you two scoundrels hadn't brought me this cursed heap of metal, I wouldn't have...

t_ch: 哎哎哎，可不兴出口伤人啊，冬妮娅小姐。当初你们三位可是对咱们的解决方案表示非常满意的呀。
t_en: Hey, hey, please get your facts right, Miss Tonya. Don't forget the three of you were very satisfied with the solution we offered.

t_ch: 没错，贝娜和希斯曼！还有这两个白痴！要不是他们好糊弄，我怎么会同意接受这个荒谬的放生方案呢！
t_en: Benna and Heathmann, those two idiots! If they hadn't been so gullible, I wouldn't have accepted this outrageous solution!

t_ch: 尤其是那个希斯曼…植物…我看他长得就像植物，早晚把他给打成植物人！咳咳咳咳咳咳……
t_en: Especially Heathmann... Plants? He looks like one himself! One day, I'll beat him up into a vegetable smoothie! *Cough, cough, cough*...

t_ch: 别激动，别激动，等你养好病，我们再来陪你放生猛兽啊！
t_en: Take it easy. When you've recovered, we'll come and release beasts with you together!

t_ch: 滚边去！等老娘养好了伤…老娘要先找那两个白痴算账，接着是你们，你们俩谁都跑不掉！
t_en: Get lost! When I get well, the first thing I'm going to do is settle the score with those two idiots. Then, I'll deal with you two. Don't think that you're going get away with this!

t_ch: （身负重伤的冬妮娅正在抽泣，还是不要打扰她了。）
t_en: (The badly injured Tonya is sobbing. I'd better leave her alone.)

t_ch: 生长了两千多年，比我岁数还大的虚陵柏啊！它就挥着那个电锯，三下五除二给砍倒了！你知道这要赔多少钱吗！
t_en: It was a Xuling Cypress that had survived for more than two thousand years! It was even older than me! Just like that, the tree was chopped off with a chainsaw by that thing! Do you know how much you have to pay for this?

t_ch: 植物，生命无价……
t_en: The life of a plant is priceless...

t_ch: 你给我好好说话！
t_en: Be serious!

t_ch: 植物，皆是寡言……
t_en: Plants can't speak...

t_ch: <size=36>好好说话！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Be serious!</size>

t_ch: 好好好，军爷息怒，军爷息怒，我好好说话……
t_en: Sure, sure. Please calm down, sir. I'll be serious...

t_ch: 原来他会好好说话啊……
t_en: It turns out he can be serious...

t_ch: 军爷我冤枉啊…那真不是我的错，这都是冬妮娅和贝娜的错……
t_en: Sir, I'm innocent... It's all Tonya's and Benna's fault...

t_ch: 她们俩的脑子要是稍微清楚一点，也不会相信那东西是植物啊！如果她们能阻止我一下，何至于变成现在这样啊！
t_en: If they had been more clearheaded, they wouldn't have believed it was a plant! They could have stopped me and avoided all the damage that ensued!

t_ch: 你不要再推卸责任了！要么你让这棵两千年的古树重新长出来，要么你找丹鼎司栽种两千棵树，你自己选吧！
t_en: Don't pass the blame to someone else! You must either revive this ancient tree or grow two thousand trees as compensation — your choice!

t_ch: 呜呜呜…那我这岂不就是…没得选吗……
t_en: *Sob*... You're leaving me with no choice at all...

t_ch: 对咯！<size=36>你没得选！</size>
t_en: Indeed! <size=36>You have no choice!</size>

t_ch: 行了，咱俩也赶紧撤吧，我感觉这希斯曼现在走投无路，快要狗急跳墙了。别一会儿给咱俩也咬出来……
t_en: Let's get out of here as soon as possible. Heathmann is at the end of his rope and seems desperate. He might sell us out soon...

t_ch: 还是别靠太近吧…这希斯曼现在快要狗急跳墙了，别一会儿咬上咱俩……
t_en: Don't get too close to Heathmann... He seems desperate. He might sell us out soon.

t_ch: 哎呀哎呀哎呀，行善积德，没想到反有恶报，真是可怜嗷~
t_en: Alas, no good deed goes unpunished. Poor things!

t_ch: 这样真的好吗…
t_en: Is this appropriate...

t_ch: 嗐，你想那么多干什么？你的目的不就是解决「放生帮」带来的麻烦？现在目的达成了，皆大欢喜。
t_en: Why are you being such a worrywart? Aren't you here to solve the trouble caused by the Unshackled? Now that you've done your job, you should be pleased.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，真有意思。
t_en: Hahaha, how interesting.

t_ch: 确实太有意思了…现在「放生帮」鸡飞狗跳，你也算是完成任务，可以去地衡司领赏了。
t_en: Indeed... Now that the Unshackled is in a mess, you've completed your mission. You can receive your reward at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 你怎么知道的！
t_en: How did you know about that?

t_ch: 别问那么多，咱俩师徒一场，我总要给你保留一些小惊喜，对吗？
t_en: Don't ask so many questions. As your tutor, I must prepare some surprises for you, right?

t_ch: 瞧你一脸忧心忡忡的样子。{NICKNAME}，我会把这件事处理妥当。
t_en: Look at how worried you are. {NICKNAME}, I'll take care of this.

t_ch: 至于怎么收场，这就不是你该操心的问题了。但是我跟你保证，接下来一定是一个皆大欢喜的大团圆结局。
t_en: You don't have to worry about how this all plays out. I can promise you a happy ending for everyone.

t_ch: 行了，热闹也看够了，剩下的放心交给我就好！你赶紧去地衡司领赏吧！
t_en: Okay, we've seen enough of the action. Please leave the rest to me! Go ahead and collect your reward at the Realm-Keeping Commission!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你好啊，有什么可以帮到你的？
t_en: Hi, {NICKNAME}. Can I help you with anything?

t_ch: 有关「放生帮」的事…
t_en: I'd like to talk about the Unshackled...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我也正打算跟您说这事儿呢，真是有劳您的帮助了。
t_en: That's what I want to discuss with you too, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for your help.

t_ch: 没想到您一番妙计，「放生帮」三个干部都自食其果了。
t_en: Thanks to your brilliant plan, the three leaders of the Unshackled have suffered the consequences of their actions.

t_ch: 看来你们收到了消息…
t_en: Seems like you got the memo...

t_ch: 这下他们应该会明白，自己一直以来到底在做些什么。
t_en: Now they should be able to realize their mistake.

t_ch: 我是不是太过分了？
t_en: Did I go too far?

t_ch: 我明白，我明白。这足以显现出您良好的道德水准。
t_en: I get it. You feel that way because you're a virtuous character.

t_ch: 不过对于那些一直以来被他们放生行为困扰的人来说，这点惩罚也许只能算是小意思。
t_en: For those who have been troubled by the actions of the Unshackled all this time, this punishment is nothing.

t_ch: 收下这笔酬金吧，这是你应得的。
t_en: Here is your reward. You deserve it.

t_ch: 以后有什么事随时来找我们，您永远是咱们地衡司公廨的座上宾。
t_en: Please feel free to drop by if you encounter any issues. You're always welcome at the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还有什么事情吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, is there anything else I can help you with?

t_ch: 有关「放生帮」的事…
t_en: I'd like to talk about the Unshackled...

t_ch: 那件事可太感谢您了，以后有什么事随时来找我们，您永远是咱们地衡司公廨的座上宾。
t_en: I really appreciate your help with that matter. Please feel free to drop by if you encounter any issues. You're always welcome at the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery.

t_ch: （钟珊到底是什么人…地衡司派出的卧底？不，不太像）
t_en: (Who exactly is Zhongshan... Is she an undercover agent of the Realm-Keeping Commission? She doesn't feel like one though.)

t_ch: （也许我得好好留意留意这几个人接下来的情况…）
t_en: (I should probably keep an eye on these people for the coming days...)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？你怎么在这儿？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?

t_ch: 我先说好，这回你和你的老师可别想撺掇我放生什么奇怪的生物……
t_en: Let me make this clear — You and your tutor better not think of persuading me into releasing some bizarre creatures this time...

t_ch: 放心，钟珊走了…
t_en: Don't worry. Zhongshan is gone...

t_ch: 我来取钟珊的信…
t_en: I'm here to collect a letter from her...

t_ch: 什么，她走了？怎么和我那三个放生帮的朋友一样，全都不告而别。
t_en: What? She left? Why did she, too, leave unannounced just like my three buddies?

t_ch: 那几位不是还在受罚吗？
t_en: Aren't they being punished?

t_ch: 我也不清楚发生了什么。按说他们罚款的罚款、拘禁的拘禁。我本来打算去瞧瞧这几个倒霉蛋的状况，看看能帮衬着做点什么。
t_en: I'm not sure what happened. I was told that they were either fined or imprisoned. I thought of visiting them to see how I could help.

t_ch: 可地衡司说他们被人缴了保释金带走了，我哪儿也找不见，发消息也不回，就好像人间蒸发了一样。
t_en: But those at the Realm-Keeping Commission said they had been taken away on bail. They were nowhere to be seen, and they didn't reply to any of my messages. It was as though they had vanished into thin air.

t_ch: 他们「放生」了放生帮。
t_en: They unshackled the Unshackled.

t_ch: 抛下放生帮的事情，走了？贝娜，有这种可能，但冬妮娅和希斯曼却不一定。
t_en: Have they decided to leave the Unshackled behind and go away? Benna might do such a thing, but not Tonya or Heathmann.

t_ch: 而且，他们身边的人都说再也没见到他们几个……
t_en: Also, none of those who are close to them has seen them so far...

t_ch: 他们走了也不会通知你啊。
t_en: I don't think they would notify you before leaving.

t_ch: 他们几个瞧不上我，走了也不吭一声，这确实可能。
t_en: It's possible, since they've always looked down on me.

t_ch: 但问了他们几个身边的人，每个人都说没见过他们……
t_en: However, none of those who are close to them have seen them either.

t_ch: 对了，你的那个朋友，说在这儿也给我留了一份礼物。让我瞧瞧是什么……
t_en: By the way, that friend of yours also left me a gift here. Let me see what it is...

t_ch: 一箱矿泉水，呵呵，她还真是个体贴人心的小姑娘。不过，那天在鳞渊境第一次遇到你们的时候，我就隐隐觉得你们不适合咱们的放生事业。
t_en: A case of mineral water. Hehe, what a thoughtful young lady. Actually, when I met you two for the first time in Scalegorge Waterscape, my intuition already told me that you two weren't cut out for this releasing business.

t_ch: …第一次遇见我们？
t_en: ...The first time you met us?

t_ch: …她不是放生帮的人？
t_en: ...Isn't she a member of the Unshackled?

t_ch: 啊？谁告诉你她是放生帮的人了？
t_en: Huh? Who told you she was one of us?

t_ch: 她不是你的朋友吗，我们都以为，你请她来做说客，想加入放生帮，不就是这么一回事吗？在她带你来之前，我们根本就不认识她。
t_en: Isn't she your friend? We thought she was there to help you persuade us to let you join the Unshackled. Wasn't it the case? We didn't know her at all before she brought you here.

t_ch: （钟珊这家伙，到底是谁？）
t_en: (Who in the world is Zhongshan?)

t_ch: 你按着钟珊消息的指示，获得了一一封信和几件小礼物。
t_en: Following the instructions in Zhongshan's message, you find a letter and several small gifts.

t_ch: 钟珊留给你的信里说了什么吗？
t_en: What did Zhongshan say in the letter?

t_ch: （告知真相）
t_en: (Tell the truth.)

t_ch: 原来…是这么一回事啊…那三个人都被她「放生」了？这真是…莫名其妙……
t_en: I see... She "unshackled" the three of them? This is... baffling...

t_ch: 唉…但这也不完全是一件坏事呀。那三个魔怔的家伙不在了，地衡司盯「放生帮」也没那么紧了，现在我的日子倒是舒服了不少。
t_en: Well, it isn't entirely a bad thing. Now that the obsessed trio isn't here, the Unshackled will be off the radar of the Realm-Keeping Commission. It makes my life a lot easier.

t_ch: （隐瞒真相）
t_en: (Keep the truth a secret.)

t_ch: 没说什么要紧事吗？唉…我还以为她至少会告诉你到底发生了什么呢。
t_en: She didn't say anything important? Alas... I thought she would at least explain the whole thing to you.

t_ch: 不过也好，那三个魔怔的家伙不在了，地衡司盯「放生帮」也没那么紧了，现在我的日子倒是舒服了不少。
t_en: Well, this isn't entirely a bad thing. Now that the obsessed trio isn't here, The Unshackled will be off the radar of the Realm-Keeping Commission. It makes my life a lot easier.

t_ch: 无论如何，那「三大善人」一时半刻是不会回来了…那么往后我就是唯一的「大善人」了…嗯，我得考虑一下「放生帮」的未来。
t_en: Anyway, it might be some time before the Three Benevolent Ones come back... From now on, I'll be the only Benevolent One... Hmm... maybe it's time to think about the future of the Unshackled.

t_ch: 往后如果有空，记得回来看看，参加参加咱们的活动…现在咱们这里是我们微观派的天下，再也不搞什么放生猛兽的狠活了。
t_en: Please feel free to swing by and take part in our activities... Now that the Microscopic Faction is at the helm, there won't be anymore dangerous activities like releasing beasts.

t_ch: 往后如果有空，记得回来看看，参加参加咱们的活动…现在咱们这里是我们微观派的天下，再也不搞什么放生猛兽的狠活了。
t_en: Please feel free to swing by and take part in our activities... Now that the Microscopic Faction is at the helm, there won't be anymore dangerous activities like releasing beasts.

t_ch: 钟珊…是你的朋友对吧？对吧？
t_en: Zhongshan... is your friend, right? Right?

t_ch: 嗯，这里气氛骇人。我正好录一些素材，嘿嘿。
t_en: Whoa, this place feels pure evil... Hee-hee, time to get some footage.

t_ch: 嘶…这张照片用做视频封面，能过审吗？
t_en: I wonder if this thumbnail would be approved...

t_ch: 嘘，家人学我，脚步放轻、放缓哈…
t_en: Shh, follow me. Keep quiet and tread lightly...

t_ch: 喂喂喂，前面似乎有人，咱俩还是绕着走吧。
t_en: Hey, hey, it looks like there's someone up ahead. Let's go around.

t_ch: 擅闯禁地的可疑人等，先抓后审，无一例外。
t_en: Suspicious individuals in a restricted area are detained first and interrogated later. No exceptions.

t_ch: 禁地？绥园什么时候成你家开的了？
t_en: Restricted area? Since when were you in charge of Fyxestroll Garden?

t_ch: 退下吧，幽府武弁。此二人并无恶意。
t_en: At ease, Wraith Warden. These two are not your enemies.

t_ch: 是，判官大人。
t_en: Understood, Your Honor.

t_ch: 我们这边走，这边比较近……
t_en: Let's go this way. It's quicker...

t_ch: 藿藿小姐，能让尾巴大爷出来合个影吗？
t_en: Miss Huohuo, can we have Mr. Tail come out for a photo?

t_ch: 桂乃芬小姐，现在正在执行公务中……
t_en: Miss Guinaifen, I'm on official duty right now...

t_ch: 好安静啊，越来越吓人了……
t_en: It's so quiet... It's getting scarier and scarier...

t_ch: 请跟紧藿藿……
t_en: Please stay close to me...

t_ch: 你们听见了吗？！这、这是什么怪声音？
t_en: Did you hear that!? Wh—What was that sound?

t_ch: 有鬼啊啊啊啊啊——
t_en: It's a ghoooost!

t_ch: 不行啊，我、我们去把桂乃芬小姐找回来吧…
t_en: Oh no... W—We have to find Miss Guinaifen...

t_ch: 你还是操心操心你自己吧。
t_en: You should consider your own safety, first...

t_ch: （这条路…我刚刚应该走过了。）
t_en: (Wasn't I... just here a moment ago?)

t_ch: （不知不觉间，我又回来了？）
t_en: (What is going on? I looped back again?)

t_ch: （看来这里的道路似乎被某种幻觉扭曲……）
t_en: (It seems like the paths here are being twisted by some sort of illusion...)

t_ch: 嘻嘻，看来你已察觉，此处万径如谜…
t_en: Hehe, you've noticed it, no? All roads are but puzzles in this place...

t_ch: 来呀，迷途之人，渴望离开吗？想的话就来找我呀？
t_en: Come, lost one! Do you desire to leave? Then come and find me!

t_ch: 这不是一般的机巧？
t_en: These are no ordinary ingenia.

t_ch: 当然啦，只是几个随我意志跳舞的棋子罢了。
t_en: Of course not. They are mere pawns dancing to my whim.

t_ch: 打！狠狠打碎它们！
t_en: Crush them! Smash them to pieces!

t_ch: 你的战意火辣辣的，尝起来好过瘾呀！
t_en: What a peppery fighting spirit! Such an addictive flavor!

t_ch: 呵呵，去找那些纸符小人吧，那是你判官朋友留下的多余线索。
t_en: Hehe, go — find all those clues your judge friend left behind. Find the talismans...

t_ch: 看来，已经准备妥当了，接下来就该离开这里了。
t_en: It seems like we're ready. Now, we just have to get out.

t_ch: 呵呵，你看，我说过我会帮你的。前面就有出路，你只管离开便是。
t_en: Hehe, see? I told you I'd help you. The way out is straight ahead. Just keep going...

t_ch: 有人一起走就放心多了…不瞒你说，我已经快要站不稳了……
t_en: I feel much safer with you here... Still feel like I'm gonna faint, though...

t_ch: 帝弓保佑！帝弓保佑！
t_en: May the Arbiter protect us!

t_ch: 这声音好像有些熟悉……
t_en: That voice sounds familiar...

t_ch: …这里好像不是正确的地方，我们选错铜镜了。
t_en: ...This isn't the right place. We picked the wrong bronze mirror.

t_ch: 又是镜子…有完没完啊？
t_en: Mirrors again... what a surprise.

t_ch: 快看四周，尾巴大爷，咱们似乎已经摸到这个幻境的边缘了……
t_en: Look around us, Mr. Tail. I think we're at the edge of the illusion...

t_ch: 也许这几面是最后的镜子了？
t_en: Maybe these are the only mirrors left?

t_ch: 那座浮空岛上好像有面镜子…就是有点远……
t_en: I think there's a mirror on that floating island... but it's a bit far away...

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊～我我我、我能不能趴着过去……
t_en: C—C—Could I crawl my way there...?

t_ch: 嘁，给老子支楞起来啊。
t_en: Quit stalling and get on with it!

t_ch: 帮帮我，尾巴大爷！
t_en: Help me, Mr. Tail!

t_ch: 你刚才的胆气到哪儿去了！
t_en: What happened to talking tough!?

t_ch: 啊啊啊啊——
t_en: Aaaah—

t_ch: 这样一来，恚炎的一部分就被装进葫芦里了。
t_en: Fragments of Furynox have been sealed in the gourd.

t_ch: 万幸，万幸，一路顺利。
t_en: Thank the Arbiter!

t_ch: 快把你那些小纸人拿出来，还记得怎么念咒吗？

t_ch: 剪剪剪、剪纸成兵，奉我敕令！灵符一道，诸患弥平！
t_en: P—P—Paper to might, carry this fight! Talisman of strength, evils to spite!

t_ch: 恚炎的力量这么强大，为何却如此轻易地愿意将自己分裂开来？
t_en: If Furynox is so powerful, why would they allow themself to break apart so easily?

t_ch: 越是强大，越是会毫无顾忌地轻视自己的对手……恰恰相反，有时候弱小才是生存之道。
t_en: The stronger you are, the more you underestimate your enemies... sometimes being weak and humble is the way to survive.

t_ch: 那是…被控制的幽府武弁……
t_en: Those are... possessed Wraith Wardens...

t_ch: 可别指望我手下留情啊。
t_en: Don't expect me to hold back.

t_ch: 放放放我们离开——
t_en: Let us go. Let us go!

t_ch: …葫芦里应该封印了不少的岁阳，走吧，我们去和雪衣大人汇合。
t_en: ...There are plenty of heliobi in the gourd now. Let's go and meet up with Madam Xueyi.

t_ch: 谢谢判官大人救我一命…
t_en: Thanks for saving me, Your Honor...

t_ch: 是雪衣大人还有…桂乃芬小姐！太好了，她没事……
t_en: It's Madam Xueyi... and Miss Guinaifen! Thank goodness she's alright...

t_ch: 地上倒着好多冥差！
t_en: There are so many spiritfarers lying on the floor!

t_ch: 好卑鄙的家伙！
t_en: You monster!

t_ch: 这妖物…真棘手……
t_en: This demon... is quite troublesome...

t_ch: 大家…没事吧？！
t_en: Is everyone okay!?

t_ch: 那家伙聚合了太多岁阳…
t_en: They've consumed too many heliobi...

t_ch: 要想一点点削弱它，吾等累死了也没有胜算。
t_en: We'd die from exhaustion before we manage to weaken it.

t_ch: 未必没有胜算啊，人偶…
t_en: We've still got a chance, puppet...

t_ch: 按它自己的话说，岁阳融聚时会形成脆弱的平衡。
t_en: Cirrus said it themselves. There's a fragile balance when heliobi fuse together.

t_ch: 你明白该怎么做吧，藿藿？
t_en: You know what to do, don't you, Huohuo?

t_ch: 可…可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 怕什么？老子没了，你不就能过上你想要的生活了吗？
t_en: But what? Aren't you gonna be living the life you've always wanted once I'm gone?

t_ch: 倦了倦了，这些小棋子太无趣了，不如你们也加入到其中来，如何？
t_en: Ugh, these pawns are no fun. Why don't you join in too, hmm?

t_ch: 你，你给我滚出去！
t_en: G—Get out!

t_ch: 浮烟，为什么不试试把本大爷也吸收了？
t_en: Hey Cirrus, why don't you try swallowing ME too, huh?

t_ch: 你疯了吗？为什么要帮助人类？！
t_en: Are you insane? Why are you helping humans!?

t_ch: 理由？需要理由吗？非要理由的话——
t_en: Why? You need a reason? How about this one...

t_ch: 那就是老子瞧不上你这个只会耍弄诡计的白痴！
t_en: I'd rather help a human than a conniving simpleton like you!

t_ch: 呜啊啊啊啊啊——！！！
t_en: Uwhaaaa—!!!

t_ch: （我是不是又…走回了起点？）
t_en: (Isn't this... where I started?)

t_ch: （我应该再好好观察一下这附近的情况，也许能打破现状。）
t_en: (I need to look closely around this place again... Maybe I can break out of the cycle.)

t_ch: 不、不能让尾巴的努力白费了！
t_en: I—I won't let Mr. Tail sacrifice himself in vain!

t_ch: 灵、灵符，听我号令！
t_en: T—Talismans. On my command!

t_ch: 灵符灵符灵符！
t_en: Talismans! Talismans!! Talismans!!!

t_ch: 你可以信任我，我也想离开这里，我们俩之间算是互相利用。
t_en: You can trust me. I want to leave this place, too. We are useful to each other.

t_ch: 你不信任我也没关系，毕竟你也摆脱不了我，哈哈哈。
t_en: In any case, It doesn't matter if you don't trust me. It's not like you can be rid of me, hahaha.

t_ch: 嘿，我让「你眼中的纸人」飘起来了，你也多注意一下呀。
t_en: Hey, use your eyes... I made the talismans float. Pay attention!

t_ch: 那边的纸人那么多，你的判官朋友肯定给你留下了什么线索，去看看呗？
t_en: There are so many paper dolls over there. Surely your judge friend left some clues for you. Won't you take a look?

t_ch: 喂喂喂，难得别人好心为你，你还是看看那边的线索吧。
t_en: Hey, hey! I'm trying to help you. Go and look at the clues.

t_ch: …我可不想按着你的手让你来看。
t_en: ...Do I have to make you drag yourself over there?

t_ch: 你看明白了吗？这篇志怪话本出现在幻障迷境里是有原因的，话本里藏着离开这里的提示，你要是记不住，就再来看一遍。
t_en: Do you understand? This story of the supernatural is in the illusory maze for a reason. It contains the clue to help us get out of here. Come back and read it again if you need to.

t_ch: 请跟紧我，我们走这个方向离开绥园。
t_en: Please stay close to me. This is the best way out of the garden.

t_ch: （这里也放着和之前差不多的话本，会和这里的谜题有关吗？）
t_en: (There's a book of ghost stories here, just like before. Could it have anything to do with this puzzle?)

t_ch: 你好啊，家人！你就是对灵异事件感到好奇才来这儿找我的，对吧？
t_en: Yo, it's you! You're interested in the supernatural, right?

t_ch: 巧了，我刚把现场直播时录下的视频剪辑完，正好能作为证据给你瞧。
t_en: Lucky for you, I just finished editing my stream — it's all the proof you need...

t_ch: 在看视频前，我想问家人你一个问题，你相信幽灵鬼怪的存在吗？
t_en: But before you watch it, I gotta ask you a question... do you believe in ghosts?

t_ch: 我相信世界上真的有鬼！
t_en: I believe!

t_ch: 我就知道！像咱俩这样的好奇宝宝通常都有着很强的第六感，能轻易感知到身边许多不对劲的东西。
t_en: I knew it! Curious cats like us usually have a better sixth sense — it's easier for us to perceive the unseen...

t_ch: 一眼鉴定为假，不看营销号。
t_en: Vids or it didn't happen... and no clickbait.

t_ch: 哼哼，不相信我的家人这下有难了。
t_en: Hehe, I think you're in for a surprise...

t_ch: 而我接下来要放出的视频，就会证明仙舟真的是个充满灵异的地方。
t_en: This video is gonna prove that the Xianzhou is full of supernatural phenomena.

t_ch: 信不信两说，但你的短信…
t_en: My beliefs aside, your messages...

t_ch: 呃，这都是模仿罗浮网络上当红主播们的视频标题…我听人说这样能吸引眼球。
t_en: Uhh, that was me copying video titles from the hottest streamers on the Luofu... I heard they help attract more viewers.

t_ch: 闲话不多说了，快看，这就是我昨天在「绥园」直播时发生的诡异事情！
t_en: Enough chit-chat — look! This is the weird stuff that happened yesterday when I was streaming in Fyxestroll Garden!

t_ch: 唉，事情发生后我和小姐妹就被赶出绥园了，但是家人你注意到重点了吗？
t_en: Me and my bestie got kicked out of the garden straight after... but did you see the key moment?

t_ch: 鬼是五毛特效？
t_en: The "ghosts" were cheap special effects?

t_ch: 怎么可能！那股子寒意、还有飘在空中非人的移动轨迹，那绝对是货真价实的鬼！不对不对，关键点是——
t_en: What!? No! There was a freezing chill, not to mention the way they drifted through the air... They were legit ghosts! Anyway, the key point was...

t_ch: 后面怎么就第三人称视角了？
t_en: Why is it in third-person perspective at the end?

t_ch: 是剪辑，我加了点剪辑。为了把事情的前因后果表达清楚，最关键的是——
t_en: Ugh, it's called editing? I edited it! That way I can show what happened before and after. Anyway, the key moment was...

t_ch: 弹幕感觉全是机器人发的…
t_en: The comments all look like bots wrote them...

t_ch: 家人你的关注点也太清奇了吧？
t_en: Why are you so focused on all the wrong things?

t_ch: 注意看，前来处理此事的不是地衡司和云骑，而是十王司的判官！
t_en: It wasn't the Realm-Keeping Commission or the Cloud Knights that came to deal with it. It was the judges from the Ten-Lords Commission!

t_ch: 十王司的判官出动，不得了！
t_en: Judges from the Ten-Lords Commission? That's crazy!

t_ch: 就是说啊，素裳原本还不相信绥园闹鬼。但判官出现了……
t_en: That's what I'm saying! At first, Sushang didn't believe that Fyxestroll Garden was haunted. But after the judges showed up...

t_ch: 十王司…是什么？
t_en: What's... the Ten-Lords Commission?

t_ch: 你来仙舟这么久，都没有听说过十王司吗？
t_en: You've been on the Xianzhou for this long and you've never heard of the Ten-Lords Commission?

t_ch: 他们是仙舟上最神秘的机构！办案人员也总是神秘出现、神秘消失。但凡他们出现的地方必有大案要案发生！
t_en: They're the most mysterious organization on the Xianzhou! Their investigators always pop up out of nowhere, then disappear without a trace. If they show up, you know something serious is going down!

t_ch: 换句话说，绥园里一定发生了什么「轰动仙舟的大事件」，咱们才能见到他们出马。
t_en: In other words, something BIG must have happened in Fyxestroll Garden for them to show up.

t_ch: 他们是去绥园捉鬼了。
t_en: They went to Fyxestroll Garden to catch ghosts...

t_ch: 没错没错，家人现在相信我不是营销号了对吧！
t_en: Exactly! Now do you believe that my content isn't clickbait?

t_ch: 也许只是一场虚惊？
t_en: Maybe it was just a false alarm?

t_ch: 有这个可能。但我和素裳很快就被判官们赶走了，而在临走前，我留意到那些判官似乎正打算在绥园里布置些什么。
t_en: Possibly... but the judges kicked me and Sushang out of there straight away. It looked like they were setting something up in the garden before we left.

t_ch: 这其中一定有阴谋…呃，我是说，有鬼！
t_en: There has to be a conspiracy... Uh, I mean — ghosts!

t_ch: 说起来，{F#小姐}{M#小哥}你有没有时间？要不要，一起去探探绥园，就咱俩？我保证这次一定能挖出其中的真相。
t_en: Actually, do you have some free time? Do you wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden together, just the two of us? I guarantee you we're gonna reveal the truth this time.

t_ch: 走，一块儿见鬼去吧~
t_en: Let's face the ghosts together!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
t_en: Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!

t_ch: 知道危险你还去？
t_en: You're going despite the risk?

t_ch: 高风险，高回报，高流量。我是说，在成长的道路上，每个人对未知事物的好奇心会被渐渐磨去，而我，我不能接受自己变成如此乏味的成年人。
t_en: High risk, high reward, high view count. As we grow up, our curiosity for the unknown gradually fades... I'm not gonna let myself become a boring grown-up.

t_ch: 幽灵出没，是因为怨念不散，还是灾难又要降临的预兆？你就不感到好奇吗？
t_en: Why are the ghosts haunting the garden? A lingering grudge, perhaps... or maybe they're an omen of some impending disaster? Aren't you curious?

t_ch: 好…好奇。
t_en: ...Sure.

t_ch: 不必害怕，到时候，只要躲在我身后就好。
t_en: Don't be scared. When the time comes, just hide behind me.

t_ch: 不好奇！
t_en: No.

t_ch: 我明白了，你怕了。我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。家人，我会一直在这儿等你！
t_en: I get it — you're scared. I'm scared too. I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!

t_ch: 我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
t_en: I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...

t_ch: 我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。我在这儿等你！
t_en: I understand — I'm scared too! I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!

t_ch: 喂喂，这不是拥有超强第六感的{NICKNAME}嘛？
t_en: Yo, how's that super strong sixth sense of yours?

t_ch: 要和我一起再探绥园吗？我保证这次咱们俩一定能挖出其中的真相。
t_en: Wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden with me? I KNOW we're gonna get to the truth this time.

t_ch: 走，一块儿见鬼去吧~
t_en: Let's face the ghosts together!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
t_en: Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!

t_ch: 我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
t_en: I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...

t_ch: 家人啊，这还有什么要考虑的？不过我能理解，我会在这儿等你的！
t_en: What? What's there to think about? I get it. I'll be waiting for you here when you're ready!

t_ch: 唔，四周黑黢黢的，总感觉好像有人在暗处盯着咱们……
t_en: It's so dark in here... It feels like we're being watched...

t_ch: 不知道家人之前听说过这绥园闹鬼的传闻吗？
t_en: Did anyone ever tell you the scary stories about Fyxestroll Garden?

t_ch: 展开讲讲？
t_en: Don't think so...

t_ch: 问得好！作为探景主播我可是做足了功课。等我找一下视频文案……
t_en: Then allow me! As a streamer, I've done my fair share of research. Let me find my script...

t_ch: 「绥绥仙狐，颀尾庞庞」，绥园本是一位狐人巧匠打造的园林洞天，供同胞们休憩闲游、赋诗宴饮的地方…以下五百字省略。
t_en: "Wandering Fox Spirits and Ghostly Tails..." Fyxestroll Garden was originally a garden delve constructed by a foxian craftmaster. It was a place for their kin to rest, write poems, and feast... et cetera et cetera.

t_ch: 据说在三十年前丰饶民战争中，狐族飞行士精锐尽出，死伤甚众。人们自发到绥园里的狐眠冢处吊唁故人…这让绥园游人稀疏，少有欢声。
t_en: It's said the elite pilots of the foxians were almost wiped out in the Denizens of Abundance Wars thirty years ago. People went to the Foxsomn Tomb in Fyxestroll Garden to grieve for the departed... Because of this, Fyxestroll Garden rarely saw visitors and was bereft of joy.

t_ch: 久而久之，绥园幽幽鬼火忽明忽暗，悲泣幽咽之声凭空回荡，「绥园闹鬼」的消息在罗浮仙舟居民间不胫而走。
t_en: Over time, Fyxestroll Garden became full of flickering ghostly flames, and weeping lamentations echoed through the air. The rumor that the garden was haunted spread like wildfire among Xianzhou Luofu residents.

t_ch: 看来绥园闹鬼一事有理有据？
t_en: Sounds like the hauntings in Fyxestroll Garden could be true after all?

t_ch: 没错，我来绥园取材，有过充分的调查。
t_en: I know, right? I did a lot of research before I decided to film here...

t_ch: 你这么了解仙舟风土人情啊？
t_en: ...Aaaand who wrote that for you?

t_ch: 家人啊，看破不说破。这条视频文案是花钱请西衍先生帮我写的，能不专业吗？
t_en: Ugh, man, is it that obvious? I paid Mr. Xiyan to write it up for me. Sounded a little too professional, huh?

t_ch: 简单说说？
t_en: Could you make it quick?

t_ch: 嗯，眼下确实也不适合长篇大论。放心，我用一句话将来龙去脉给你整明白。
t_en: Sure, I guess now's not really a good time for stories... Don't worry — I can sum it up in a single sentence.

t_ch: 这绥园是一处园林洞天，不过后来有人在狐眠冢吊唁阵亡的狐族将士，这里便渐渐传出了「绥园闹鬼」的传闻。
t_en: Fyxestroll Garden used to be a garden delve, but people started coming here to mourn fallen foxian fighters at the Foxsomn Tomb, and rumors spread that the garden was haunted.

t_ch: 闹鬼传闻虽然听起来荒诞，但这次十王司来人可是真的。
t_en: I know it's easy to cast doubt, but the Ten-Lords Commission actually showed up this time.

t_ch: 说到这个，要是前面有什么风吹草动，咱俩可千万要绕开走。不说撞见鬼，万一遇见了判官，咱俩肯定会被赶出来，这一趟就算是白来了。
t_en: Speaking of which, we have to avoid running into the judges. If we get kicked out, it'll all be for nothing.

t_ch: 好了，该嘱咐的都嘱咐完了，咱接着走，当心脚下。
t_en: Anyway, that's the background. Let's keep moving, and watch your step...

t_ch: 停停停，停下。
t_en: Wait, wait, wait — stop.

t_ch: …那有十王司的冥差巡逻，咱们换条路走吧——先走狐眠冢那边，绕进谈狐林好了。
t_en: ...There are Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarers on patrol. Let's go the other way — we'll head to the Foxsomn Tomb first, then cut through the Locufox Forest.

t_ch: 哇，没想到{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}你这么强。但这些人毕竟是公职人员，要是咱俩被盘问起来，得有个说辞……
t_en: Wow, I didn't know you were so strong, bro! But these are Luofu officials... if we're interrogated, we need to get our story straight...

t_ch: 就说冥差们被恶灵附身了…
t_en: We could say evil spirits possessed the spiritfarers...

t_ch: 妙哇，就说咱们是出于自卫，迫不得已。
t_en: Perfect! Let's just say it was self-defense. We had no choice.

t_ch: 就说咱们被恶灵附身了…
t_en: We could say that evil spirits possessed us...

t_ch: 有道理，狂性大发，失去行为责任能力…还是你懂的多。
t_en: Makes sense. We went crazy and couldn't control ourselves... I like the way you think.

t_ch: 我们有来过这儿吗？
t_en: Perhaps we were never here?

t_ch: 哇噢，确实。没有目击证人就是没有喽。咱们快走吧。
t_en: Whoa! Nice! There were no witnesses, so this never happened, alright?

t_ch: …咱们还是快走吧。
t_en: ...Let's keep going.

t_ch: 站住！
t_en: Halt!

t_ch: 你们是什么人，为什么会来到这里？立刻逮捕！
t_en: State your name and your business! Arrest them immediately!

t_ch: …家、家人们，听我解释啊！
t_en: ...Wh—What's up guys, hear me out!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，瞧见了没？这个姐姐肤色惨白，眼神飘忽…她到底是人是鬼啊？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, look how pale she is! And it seems like her eyes aren't even focusing... Is she a ghost?

t_ch: 入得十王司，你们尽可以把我当成已死之人了。小女子代号「寒鸦」，身为判官，执掌拘、锁、刑、问四部职责之末。故而，我对你们二位并非一无所知。
t_en: As a member of the Ten-Lords Commission, you may as well consider me a member of the dead. I am a judge, alias "Hanya." Of the four duties of detention, incarceration, interrogation, and punishment, I'm responsible for interrogation. Therefore, I know a thing or two about you.

t_ch: 桂乃芬，化外民，无业…于前日和云骑士卒素裳进入绥园。
t_en: Guinaifen, an Outworlder, unemployed... You entered Fyxestroll Garden with Sushang, a Cloud Knight, the day before yesterday.

t_ch: 欸，无业？是{RUBY_B#杂耍}街头行为艺术家{RUBY_E#}和寻找时事热点的主播啦！主播！好歹是个正经的营生！
t_en: Huh? Unemployed? I'm a {RUBY_B#juggler}street performer{RUBY_E#} and a streamer who reports on current events! A streamer! It's a legit operation!

t_ch: 至于这边这个……
t_en: As for this one here...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，久仰久仰。
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you.

t_ch: …星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
t_en: ...A passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.

t_ch: 你、你好…我是十王司判官，我叫藿藿。
t_en: H—Hello... I'm a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. My name is Huohuo.

t_ch: 藿藿，你已是十王司判官了，说话要再有底气一些。
t_en: As a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, you should speak with more confidence, Huohuo.

t_ch: …是、是。
t_en: ...O—Okay.

t_ch: 大人，都是桂乃芬的主意！
t_en: Your Honor, it was all Guinaifen's idea!

t_ch: 这、这么快就把我出卖了吗？好吧，一人做事一人当，确实是我劝{F#她}{M#他}一起来的。
t_en: A—Are you really selling me out that fast? Whatever, I'll take the hit... It's true, I persuaded {M#him}{F#her} to come along.

t_ch: 不管是谁的主意…两位，这儿已被划为禁区，无干人等不得入内。
t_en: Regardless whose idea it was... This place has been designated as a restricted area. No one is allowed to enter.

t_ch: 你想必听过…银河球棒侠。
t_en: You must have heard of... the Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
t_en: You are a passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.

t_ch: …{F#她}{M#他}就是星穹列车上的无名客？
t_en: ...{M#He's}{F#She's} the Nameless? From the train?

t_ch: 说说吧，桂乃芬，去而复返，所为何事？
t_en: Tell me, Guinaifen. Why did you return here?

t_ch: 呃，也没什么，就是好久没有更新了，想拍些有关幽灵鬼怪的影像，当作视频素材…嘿嘿。
t_en: Uh, no reason. I haven't posted anything for ages, so I wanted to film some ghosts for my videos... hehe.

t_ch: 吾已说过，仙舟之上并无鬼魂。这是荒诞迷信，身为仙舟住民，理当不信谣不传谣。
t_en: We have already told you there are no ghosts on the Xianzhou — it is a ridiculous superstition. As a resident of the Xianzhou, you should refrain from believing or spreading rumors.

t_ch: 但我明明看见了，那些家伙冒着吱吱鬼火，发出桀桀怪笑，再说了，素裳也瞧见了——
t_en: But I saw them! They had ghostly flames coming out of their body, and they were cackling! And Sushang saw them too—

t_ch: 桂乃芬小姐，虽然一时半会儿很难解释清楚，但那些东西并不是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，请不要把家乡的传说套在仙舟的事情上……
t_en: Miss Guinaifen, it's hard to explain, but those things aren't ghosts. Please don't bring legends from your home world onto the Xianzhou...

t_ch: 那些溜出来作祟的东西，是非常危险的能量寄生物「岁阳」。
t_en: The roaming entities you saw are extremely dangerous energy parasites... We call them "heliobi."

t_ch: 真的吗？我不信。岁阳？那是什么？我明白啦，在仙舟上，岁阳就是幽灵的别称，对吧？一定是这么回事。
t_en: ...I... Really? I don't believe it. "Heliobi"? What's that? Ohh, I get it — "heliobi" is just another word for "ghost" on the Xianzhou, right? That's gotta be it.

t_ch: 看来还是得让尾巴大爷出来一趟…尾、尾巴大爷？
t_en: Maybe we should let Mr. Tail out for a bit... M—Mr. Tail?

t_ch: 听到了听到了！吵死了…本大爷又不是伺候人类的珍禽异兽。
t_en: I heard you, I heard you! Tsk, unbelievable... What am I, her pet?

t_ch: 尾巴…大爷？
t_en: Mr. Tail...?

t_ch: 老子就是岁阳，就是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，看明白了吗？看明白了就滚！
t_en: I'm a heliobus! We're not ghosts. Got it? Now scram!

t_ch: 鬼啊！
t_en: GHOOOOOOOOST!!!

t_ch: 哎呀，真是个奇怪的小姑娘，明明就是为了拍摄灵异鬼怪而来的嘛，怎么真见到了反而大呼小叫起来了……
t_en: What a strange girl. Here to film ghosts, yet terrified when she lays eyes on one...

t_ch: 深呼吸！小桂子，冷静！深呼吸！欸，能不能让我和这、这个尾巴大爷再聊两句？
t_en: Deep breaths, Little Gui, deep breaths...! Ahem, c—can I have a small chat with this... "Mr. Tail?"

t_ch: 滚，老子没空跟你吹牛放屁。
t_en: I said scram. I have no time to talk nonsense with you.

t_ch: 好凶的幽灵！
t_en: What a rude ghost!

t_ch: 说了好几遍老子不是幽灵，再啰嗦就把你们都吃了！
t_en: I told you, I'm not a ghost! If I have to repeat myself again I'll be eating every one of you!

t_ch: 两位别怕，它只是说说的，尾巴大爷它吃素呢。
t_en: Please don't be afraid, he's only kidding. Mr. Tail is a vegetarian.

t_ch: 走吧，人家不想搭理咱。
t_en: Let's go. He doesn't want to talk to us.

t_ch: 这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}挺有眼力见。
t_en: Finally, someone with common sense.

t_ch: 不能撤，这可是个千载难逢的取材机会！
t_en: N—No way! This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to get something for my vids!

t_ch: 判官大人，冒昧问下，这火焰团子到底是个什么东西？该如何防范它暴起伤人？还有还有…为什么判官大人会随身带着这么个东西……
t_en: Your Honor, if I may ask, what exactly is this... fire thing? How can we prevent it from hurting people? ...And why is a judge carrying one around with her...?

t_ch: 该见的都见了，判官还有要事处理。藿藿，送客。
t_en: I believe we're done here. We have important matters to attend to. Huohuo, please see them off.

t_ch: 遵、遵命。
t_en: Y—Yes, ma'am.

t_ch: 姐姐别生气，您平时外出执行任务，少有待人接物的经验，这件事不妨交给寒鸦处置，只要我能说明原因，他们自会离开。
t_en: Sister, don't be angry. Most of your time is spent in the field — you're not accustomed to dealing with others. Leave this to me. If I explain the reasoning, they will leave.

t_ch: 眼下绥园的异状不可避免地会引来关注，防不胜防。今天粗暴打发了不明就里的二人，他们心有不甘，万一再来，却不一定能有再遇上我们的好运。
t_en: As things stand, the situation in Fyxestroll Garden is sure to keep drawing attention. If we forcibly dismiss these two today, their curiosity will remain — who knows what might happen if they decide to come back. They might not be lucky enough to run into us next time.

t_ch: 二位想必听说过工造司「造化洪炉」破损一事。其中封锁的「岁阳」妖物走脱，盘踞此处，十王司正受命抓捕。劝你们速速离开，也是为了安全着想。
t_en: I assume the two of you heard about the damage done to the Artisanship Commission's Creation Furnace? The "heliobi" sealed within escaped and have been haunting this place. The Ten-Lords Commission has orders to capture them. I am strongly advising you to leave — for your own safety.

t_ch: 你们有疑惑，可以提问，寒鸦会尽力满足你们的好奇心。但问完之后，还希望两位保守秘密，乖乖离开绥园，别再回来。
t_en: If you have any questions, raise them now — I will do my best to satisfy your curiosity. But I hope you will keep any information you hear in strict confidence... and then leave Fyxestroll Garden — never to return.

t_ch: 这位判官大人真是通情达理，谢谢啦。我发誓，问完就走。
t_en: Th—That's very reasonable, Your Honor! Thank you. I promise we'll leave after asking our questions.

t_ch: 寒鸦身为因果殿录事者，虽然谈不上无所不知，但会尽量满足你们的好奇心，问吧。
t_en: As a clerk at the Hall of Karma, my knowledge on these matters is somewhat limited, but I will try my best to satisfy your curiosity. Please proceed.

t_ch: 岁阳到底是什么？
t_en: What exactly are heliobi?

t_ch: 若按太卜司的分类，它们是来自天外的能量寄生物，以妖异火焰形象出现的「星火之精」。
t_en: According to the Divination Commission's classification, they are energy parasites from the cosmos itself. They are "Starfire Essence" that materialize in the form of strange fire.

t_ch: 若用比喻来说，它们就像喜爱追逐热源的飞蛾。只不过这「热源」不是别的，而是有情生灵的思想。
t_en: Metaphorically speaking, they are like moths to a flame... but that flame is the thoughts of sentient beings.

t_ch: 这东西很危险？
t_en: Are heliobi dangerous?

t_ch: 嗯。它们喜爱寄生在有智慧的生命身上，汲取他们的体验，品尝他们的情绪。
t_en: Yes. They attach themselves to sentient beings, feeding off their host's experiences and emotions.

t_ch: 渐渐地，岁阳会扎根宿主的神经系统，利用其内心的欲望和弱点，让他产生种种颠倒妄想，如同操纵棋子傀儡般摆弄宿主。宿主则会对岁阳言听计从，我们称之为「夺舍」。
t_en: A heliobus will slowly take root in its host's nervous system, using their deepest desires and weaknesses to create wild delusions. They manipulate their host like a chess piece. The host has no choice but to obey the heliobus, so we refer to it as "possession."

t_ch: 到了这一步，被寄生者脑袋里装的已经不再是过去的自己了，而是一个与自己相似却截然不同的岁阳。宿主的身躯很快会被岁阳耗干殆尽，就像被焚烧燃尽的柴薪。
t_en: By that point, the host is no longer who they once were, but a heliobus both similar to and completely different from their past self. The host's body will soon be exhausted by the heliobus — like burnt firewood.

t_ch: 所以，尾巴也很危险？
t_en: So, Tail is dangerous, too?

t_ch: {F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}怎么说话的！什么叫「也很危险」？老子就是最危险的那一挂！
t_en: Dangerous!? You don't know the half of it! The other heliobi are nothing compared to me!

t_ch: 尾巴…已被寒鸦大人镇伏在我尾巴上了，不会危害别人的。
t_en: Tail... was subdued and sealed in my tail by Madam Hanya. He won't harm others.

t_ch: 令人头疼的是，岁阳并非血肉凡物，难以灭去。所以在修复「造化洪炉」前，十王司打算在这座废园里立起「束形却邪阵」，囚缚这些妖物。
t_en: Regrettably, heliobi are not flesh-and-blood, and so they are difficult to destroy. Before the restoration of the Creation Furnace, the Ten-Lords Commission plans to set up an "Evil Binding Matrix" in this abandoned garden to imprison these abominations.

t_ch: 我没问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 如各位所见，这「束形却邪阵」尚未完成，逃逸的岁阳尚未全部收复，这里依旧凶险，我会让判官藿藿送你们离开园子。
t_en: As you can see, the Evil Binding Matrix has not yet been completed, and not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered. This area is still very dangerous. I will ask Judge Huohuo to escort you out of the garden.

t_ch: 「岁阳尚未全部收复」…也就是说仙舟上别处的灵异事件也有可能和岁阳有关？大人，我消息灵通得很，也许可以帮到你们！
t_en: "Not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered..." So that means the other supernatural stuff that's been happening on the Luofu might be related? Your Honor! I have loads of info sources! Maybe I can help you!

t_ch: 不需要！无关人等即刻离开，送客。
t_en: Unnecessary. Those not involved should leave now. Go.

t_ch: 那个…两位…我们该走了。
t_en: Um... Excuse me... We should go.

t_ch: 此地不宜久留，请即刻离开。
t_en: This place is dangerous. You should leave at once.

t_ch: 这绥园中异象频出，十王司也无法保护你们周全，我劝二位趁早离开。
t_en: Fyxestroll Garden is full of abnormalities — even the Ten-Lords Commission cannot guarantee your safety. I suggest you leave immediately.

t_ch: 闹鬼、岁阳、夺舍…？我感觉自己的脑袋像是被人插了一杆子，然后用力搅和了一下。
t_en: Ghosts? Heliobi? Possession...? That was a big info dump, my brain is still loading...

t_ch: 不过仔细想想，这和都市传说里的幽灵作祟也没区别嘛。「能量寄生物」什么的，听起来就像是某种病虫害一样…一点也不神秘、不恐怖了？
t_en: ...It all sounds more like an urban myth than a ghost story. "Energy parasite" sounds more cool than scary... don't you think?

t_ch: 传说就是因为不了解产生的。
t_en: Myths are born out of ignorance.

t_ch: 很有道理。不过观众不了解底细，岁阳和幽灵也没什么区别。
t_en: Yeah, I guess so... I still feel like my audience will see them as ghosts, to be honest.

t_ch: 去除神秘感，也就镇伏了鬼怪。
t_en: Ghosts can't exist without mystery.

t_ch: …我从没往这个角度想过。崇拜你，家人。
t_en: ...Mm, I never thought about it like that. Nice take!

t_ch: 但观众喜欢神秘感，喜欢捉摸不透的秘密和阴谋。咱们这些主播也只能看人上菜了。
t_en: My audience likes getting to the bottom of mysteries, secrets, and conspiracies... We streamers have to cater to that, you know?

t_ch: 唔，好奇心得到满足了，虽然产生了更多的问题，但既然答应了判官们要走，咱就不能食言了。
t_en: *sigh* I've got loads more questions, but my curiosity is satisfied for now. We better leave before the judges decide to arrest us.

t_ch: …不过要是路上能拍下几段关于尾巴大爷的视频，起个「绥园惊现灵异鬼火，附身无辜狐人女孩」的标题，应该还挺抓眼球的？
t_en: ...I'm gonna see if I can get a video of Mr. Tail on the way back — I've already got the title: "Demonic Fire Suddenly Appears in Fyxestroll Garden! Innocent Foxian Girl Possessed!" What do you think? That'd get so many views...

t_ch: 家人，到时候你配合我一下呗？
t_en: ...Can you give me a hand?

t_ch: 真拿你没办法。
t_en: What are we gonna do with you...

t_ch: 哦呼，你人真好。
t_en: Wow! That's a yes, right...?

t_ch: 不帮。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 不帮就不帮嘛，这么凶啊。
t_en: Okay, fine! No need to be so blunt about it.

t_ch: 惹毛判官小心吃几百年牢饭。
t_en: You'll be handed a few centuries of jail time if you irritate the judges.

t_ch: 嗯，说的在理。不过我上限也就能坐几十年牢，嘿嘿。
t_en: Mm, true, but I'd probably only do a few decades, hehe.

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 家人，记得配合我一下，咱们走吧。
t_en: Yo, remember, I'll need your help. Let's go.

t_ch: 两位，咱们可以上路了吗？
t_en: ...Excuse me, can we go now?

t_ch: 尾巴也要一起吗？
t_en: Is Tail coming too?

t_ch: 嗯…他被封印在我的尾巴上……
t_en: Yes... he's trapped in my tail, so...

t_ch: 封印、封印、封印…呸，我早晚得让你撕了那封印。
t_en: Bah — trapped for now... Sooner or later I'll find a way to make you break the seal...

t_ch: 你以为我愿意跟你呆一块呀？
t_en: You think I like spending time with you?

t_ch: 你看着很紧张…
t_en: You look nervous...

t_ch: 我听说岁阳逃逸到处作乱，心里有点害怕。但是我、我会负责把你们送出绥园的，这点小事…我还是做得到的……
t_en: I—I'm just a bit scared about the heliobi reports... b—but I'll carry out my duties and escort you out of the garden. I should be able to do that, at least...

t_ch: 要是连这点事都办不好，趁早辞了职支个小摊卖点心吧。
t_en: Tsk... If you can't then you better give up the day job and start peddling desserts...

t_ch: 要不是…要不是因为被你缠上，我早就…早就能支个小摊过上安安稳稳的小日子了。
t_en: Hmph, i—if it weren't for you, I would've opened a dessert stall ages ago!

t_ch: 出发吗？
t_en: Shall we go?

t_ch: 嗯，有劳你了。
t_en: Yes. Please lead the way.

t_ch: 咱们走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 等一小会，我还有事。
t_en: I still have something to do.

t_ch: 出发吗？
t_en: Shall we go?

t_ch: 嗯，有劳你了。
t_en: Yes, thank you.

t_ch: 咱们走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 等一小会，我还有事。
t_en: I still have something to do.

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊～怎、怎怎怎么了吗？
t_en: Wahhhh! Wh—Wh—What's happening?

t_ch: 你、你你你别害怕！
t_en: D—D—Don't be scared!

t_ch: 没没没有在怕啊，我、我我只是站不稳而已……
t_en: I—I—I'm not scared! I just can't stop my legs shaking...

t_ch: 是尾巴大爷的同类吗？
t_en: Is it the same kind of thing as Mr. Tail?

t_ch: 尾巴，是其他岁阳吗？
t_en: Tail, is it another heliobus?

t_ch: 是个屁，大爷我什么都没瞧见，你个小怂包。
t_en: It's nothing. You scaredy-cat, I didn't see a single thing.

t_ch: 没什么事，我们继续走吧。
t_en: We're all good. Let's keep going.

t_ch: …哦、哦。刚才听见桂乃芬小姐大喊起来，所以慌了神……
t_en: ...Oh... I heard Miss Guinaifen yell, so I got scared...

t_ch: …对了，桂乃芬小姐呢？桂乃芬小姐——
t_en: ...Wait a minute... where did Miss Guinaifen go? Miss Guinaifen...!

t_ch: …不、不会是跟丢了吧……
t_en: ...D—Did we lose her...?

t_ch: 这周围的气氛是不是不太对…我好害怕，你离我近一些，我怕你也不见了……
t_en: Is it me or is this place starting to feel weirder and weirder...? I'm scared... Can you stay close to me? I don't want to lose you, too...

t_ch: 先找到桂乃芬小姐再出去吧…别离我太远了，求求你了……
t_en: We need to find Miss Guinaifen, first... Stay close to me — please...!

t_ch: 我还以为你也走丢了，我好怕啊…不要把我一个人留在这里……
t_en: I thought I'd lost you, too. I'm so scared... Please don't leave me here all on my own...

t_ch: 桂乃芬？你在哪儿？藿藿，跟紧脚步——
t_en: Guinaifen? Where are you? Huohuo, stay close...

t_ch: 人呢？糟了，藿藿也不见了……
t_en: Huohuo? Oh no. Where did she go...?

t_ch: 这是…镜子？看着怪瘆人的。
t_en: Is this... a mirror? It looks a little creepy...

t_ch: （…这里是？）
t_en: (...Where am I?)

t_ch: （我这是在哪儿？绥园里？似乎又有些不一样？）
t_en: (Is this... Fyxestroll Garden? But it looks different somehow...)

t_ch: （总之，先往前走走看吧。）
t_en: (... I should keep moving.)

t_ch: 嘶，你身上有股特别的味道，你是……
t_en: Hmm, you have a strange scent on you. You must be...

t_ch: 我听闻绥园的落叶低语，火苗哭泣，它们向我倾诉，有一具强大的肉身靠近了…
t_en: I have heard the whispers of the leaves that fall in Fyxestroll Garden. The flames weep and profess to me that a powerful mortal approaches...

t_ch: 它们说那人身上有和「幻胧」战斗过的气息……
t_en: They carry the scent of a great battle... with none other than Phantylia...

t_ch: 你就是…那个驱走「幻胧」的人……
t_en: You... You are the one who drove Phantylia away...

t_ch: 好…好强大，光是感受你的存在，就美味到令人发抖！
t_en: ...What power... Your presence alone is delicious enough to make one tremble!

t_ch: 让我尝尝你？一口，就一小口，我迫不及待想品一品你的滋味！
t_en: Let me taste you, please! One bite! Just one bite! I can't wait to savor you!

t_ch: 嘻嘻，打得不错。不过刚才那一场酣战，你的求生欲被激发起来咯。
t_en: Hehe, you fought well... you were fighting for your survival, after all...

t_ch: 我就把这当成是个请柬，暂时依附在你的身体里喽？
t_en: I'll take that as my invitation to inhabit you for a while...

t_ch: 你是谁？你有什么目的？
t_en: Who are you? What do you want?

t_ch: 美味的宿主，你尝起来很特别。你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处…那是什么东西？一颗太阳？噢噢，它好烫！
t_en: Oh, my delicious host, you taste so special... different from anyone else I've ever possessed. But what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

t_ch: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，至于我的目的嘛，大可放心，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
t_en: You can call me Cirrus. As for what I want... rest assured — I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

t_ch: 我说了「不」，滚出去！
t_en: I said no! Get out!

t_ch: 噢噢噢，你在抗拒我，好疼！好过瘾！真是个意志力强大的宿主。
t_en: Argh, resisting are we...? Impressive willpower! How painful, how delectable!

t_ch: 你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
t_en: You're different from anyone else I've ever possessed... but what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

t_ch: 放心吧，我对霸占你的肉体没那么大的兴趣，我在里面呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
t_en: Worry not, I have no interest in making you my home — I'll be gone before you know it. Let's get along while it lasts, shall we?

t_ch: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
t_en: You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

t_ch: 行，就待那儿吧，别惹事。
t_en: Fine. Just stay put and don't cause trouble.

t_ch: …哇哦，你的情绪很放松，就像一块蓬松轻盈的糕点。就像…这具身体不是你的一样？{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，是什么让你这么豁达？
t_en: ...Incredible, such a relaxed specimen — a soft cake of a host... It's almost as if... as if this body doesn't even belong to you? What makes you so detached, young {M#man}{F#lady}?

t_ch: 还有，你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
t_en: And what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

t_ch: 算啦，我在这儿呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
t_en: Never mind. I won't be staying for long, so let's get along while it lasts, shall we?

t_ch: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
t_en: You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

t_ch: 说说现状吧，仙舟人管你的遭遇叫「鬼打墙」，继续没头脑地走下去也无济于事。
t_en: Allow me to explain what's happening... The Xianzhou natives call it a "ghost lock." You're walking in a circle, and no amount of walking will get you out of it.

t_ch: 所以，我会帮你离开「恚炎」设下的幻障迷境；而你，要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。我们互惠互利，谁也不欠着谁，如何？
t_en: So, I'm going to help you break free of the circle that Furynox created, and you're going to help me evade the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. It's a win-win... How does that sound?

t_ch: 新名词出现了！「恚炎」？
t_en: What did you just say? Who's "Furynox?"

t_ch: 正如你所见，我并非这里的主人，是另一只岁阳「恚炎」设下了这处迷境。
t_en: You must have figured out that I'm not the master of this place... It was created by another heliobus named Furynox.

t_ch: 很遗憾，能帮你的只有我了。
t_en: Unfortunately, I'm the only one who can help you escape from here.

t_ch: 我已经找到离开这里的线索了…
t_en: I've already found clues that can get me out of here...

t_ch: 那个迷路的狐狸判官留下的纸符？它帮不了你。
t_en: You mean the talismans left behind by "little lost fox judge"? Those won't help you.

t_ch: 既然你被我附身，我能让你看到原本看不到的东西。
t_en: Now that I'm possessing you, I can make you see things that you couldn't see before.

t_ch: 好，达成战略合作。
t_en: Fine. This is just a strategic partnership.

t_ch: 不错，你果然是有些见识。
t_en: Good. I'm glad we understand each other.

t_ch: 我拒绝与你合作。
t_en: I refuse to work with you.

t_ch: 真是顽固的家伙，没有我你压根没法离开这儿。何况我也不是在征询你的意见。
t_en: What a stubborn fool — you won't ever get out of here without my help. Anyway, I'm not here to ask your opinion.

t_ch: 出于尊重，我不会随意折腾你的肉体。只要达成目的，我会离开。
t_en: As a courtesy, I shall leave you intact, for the time being... As soon as I get what I want, I'll be gone.

t_ch: 现在你再去瞧那些纸符小人吧，你会知道如何继续前进的。
t_en: Now, go and look at those talismans again — the paper dolls. You'll know where to go.

t_ch: 站住，记得我们的交易吗？你要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。
t_en: Stop. Do you remember our deal? You need to help me evade capture.

t_ch: 前面就有一个判官，你怕了！
t_en: There's a judge up ahead. What, are you scared?

t_ch: 呵呵，那个判官？隔着老远我就品尝到了她咸咸的恐惧了，那样的胆小鬼也能做判官？
t_en: Ha! THAT judge? I can taste her fear from miles away! That coward has no right calling herself a judge.

t_ch: 呃…棘手的是她身上依附的那个东西，那家伙，我不想和它打照面。
t_en: But... that thing attached to her is the tricky part. That's something I don't wish to face.

t_ch: 我要带那姑娘一起离开。
t_en: I'm getting her out of here, too.

t_ch: 真麻烦，这就是所谓的同情心吗？尝起来酸酸的，哕……
t_en: Ugh... Is this what humans call "sympathy"? How acerbic. Yuck...

t_ch: 我会遵守承诺的。
t_en: I keep my promises.

t_ch: 嗯，我能感受到你信守承诺的笃定。这份念头沉沉的，不太好消化。
t_en: Mm, I can taste your integrity — such a rich flavor. A little hard to digest...

t_ch: 谁跟你达成交易了？
t_en: I did NOT make a deal with you.

t_ch: 小嘴还挺硬的嘛。不打紧，等你在这儿多转悠几圈，你会服软的。
t_en: Aren't you a stubborn one? But that's okay. You'll come around once you've walked a few more circles in this place.

t_ch: 别管那个判官小姑娘，咱们俩离开这儿就行。
t_en: Forget about the judge — just get us both out of here.

t_ch: …等等，不要无视我呀！
t_en: ...Wait! Please don't leave me!

t_ch: 算是我求你了，能再靠近一些吗？我好害怕……
t_en: Please, I'm begging you! Can you please come closer? I'm so scared...

t_ch: …那个，你见到桂乃芬小姐没有？我还没能找到她，她不会出什么事了吧……
t_en: ...Um, have you seen Miss Guinaifen? I still haven't found her. Is she gonna be okay...?

t_ch: 咱们去找她。
t_en: Let's go find her.

t_ch: 她应该也被困在某个角落里。
t_en: She's probably trapped somewhere around here.

t_ch: 别说这个了，我被岁阳附体了！
t_en: Forget about her — I got possessed by a heliobus!

t_ch: 别找了。桂乃芬这会儿多半已经被岁阳吃了吧？
t_en: Give it up. Guinaifen was probably eaten by the heliobi already.

t_ch: 怎怎怎、怎么会这样？ 连阳气旺盛的桂乃芬也···那我岂不更容易被盯上了......
t_en: H—H—How can that be!? If that could happen to someone as lively as Miss Guinaifen... that means I'm in even more danger...

t_ch: （这是我自己说出来的话吗？）
t_en: (Did I really just say that...?)

t_ch: （嘻嘻，声带可是人类身上最容易操纵的肌肉。）
t_en: (Hehe... Did you know that the larynx is the easiest muscle to control in the human body?)

t_ch: （桂乃芬真的被岁阳吃掉了？）
t_en: (Did Guinaifen really get eaten by heliobi?)

t_ch: （你猜？）
t_en: (Why don't you take a guess?)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}你肯定能找到出去的路吧！请务必带上我一起走……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you can find the way out, right? Please take me with you...

t_ch: 本大爷就是受不了你这怂包样儿，身为十王司判官，怎么总想着向别人求助啊？
t_en: Ugh, not this again! You're a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission — why are you always begging others for help?

t_ch: 你知道我根本不是当判官的料啊。以前我以为在十王司当差久了，会培养出勇气，现在发现…不行就是不行啊。
t_en: You know I'm not cut out to be a judge. I thought maybe if I worked long enough in the Ten-Lords Commission, I'd get braver. But now... I know it's impossible.

t_ch: 嘁，没用的东西，老子怎么就被封印在你身上了？
t_en: Tsk, useless brat. Why was I sealed in with someone like you?

t_ch: 成天只会耀武扬威，一不留神咱们就一块儿掉进别人的陷阱里了…到底是谁没用啊！
t_en: You talk tough all day long, then let both of us get stuck in a trap... Who's the useless brat now!?

t_ch: 放心！我会带你出去！
t_en: Calm down! I'll get you out of here!

t_ch: 我也找不到出路，全靠你了。
t_en: I can't find the way out either. It's all up to you.

t_ch: 救命啊，我被岁阳附体了！
t_en: HELP! I got possessed by a heliobus!

t_ch: 你跟着我也没用啊，我要走了，把你一个人留在这里。再见！
t_en: There's no point in following me. I'm leaving, and you're not coming with me. Goodbye!

t_ch: 啊啊啊，别走别走，等等我……
t_en: Ah! No! P—Please don't leave. Wait, please...

t_ch: 刚才那些话都不是我说的！
t_en: I didn't say that!

t_ch: （真的吗？你敢说在心底没有一丝把她抛下的念头？）
t_en: (Oh, but you did... and can you swear that you don't want to leave her behind? Not even a little?)

t_ch: 浮烟，你这畜生…
t_en: Cirrus, you beast...

t_ch: （哈？从生命分类的角度来看，你更接近这个词呢~）
t_en: (Beast? From a taxonomic perspective, I believe you're closer to that definition...)

t_ch: （哎哟，学乖了，不说话？那么，我来编几句台词，你乖乖照着念就好。）
t_en: (Oh, you're not gonna fight back anymore? Then let me make up some lines. Just be good and say it with me.)

t_ch: 十王司真是不挑不拣，连你这样的废物都能成为判官，真是让人笑掉大牙。
t_en: The Ten-Lords Commission needs to overhaul their hiring criteria. How did someone as useless as you ever become a judge?

t_ch: 呜呜……
t_en: *sob*

t_ch: 喂喂，差不多得了，能够数落这家伙的只有老子…和那几个判官，明白吗！
t_en: Hey, cut it out. I'm the only one around here who gets to tell this kid off... Me and those other judges. Got that!?

t_ch: …啧，不对劲，我闻到了同类的味道。
t_en: ...Wait. Hold on. I smell something familiar...

t_ch: 是你啊，浮烟。躲在傀儡的身体里玩腹语，还真符合你这杂碎一贯的操行。
t_en: Cirrus... it's you. Still a fan of your pathetic ventriloquist act, I see.

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈哈！可笑可笑可笑，真是可笑极了！我原以为你逃脱了在洪炉里受苦的命运呢？
t_en: Haha... Hahahaha! Oh, this is funny! This is just too funny! I thought you'd already escaped the Furnace's destiny of torture!?

t_ch: 谁能想到，大岁阳「燎原」最好斗的碎片，竟然被封印在一个哭哭唧唧的小姑娘身体里充当看门狗——
t_en: Who would have thought that a piece of Ignamar the Great — the fragment with the most fight in it — would become a guard dog sealed inside a crybaby...

t_ch: 啊，不对，不对不对不对，现在的你，连看门狗都算不上！你只是一条…「尾巴」～对吧，尾巴尾巴尾巴！
t_en: Oh! Forgive me! Did I say guard dog? No, no, no, that won't do... You're just a guard dog's "tail," right? Just a tail, a tail, a tail!

t_ch: 蹬鼻子上脸了是吧？从那个{F#女孩}{M#小子}身体里滚出来，老子这就把你吞了！
t_en: Laugh while you can, coward! I'm gonna swallow you whole the second you leave that {M#boy's}{F#girl's} body!

t_ch: 好、好害怕啊——嘿嘿，我装的！
t_en: H—How t—t—terrifying, ahahaha...! The joke's on you!

t_ch: 现在的你，连离开那个判官的身体都办不到了吧？既没有办法彻底吞掉她，也没法逃离。嘿嘿，尾巴大爷，现在的你，好可怜呀~
t_en: You couldn't leave that judge's body if you tried! You can't eat her, let alone escape from her. Ahahaha, "Mr. Tail." You're pathetic~

t_ch: ……可恶！小怂包，快想想法子！
t_en: ...Darn it! Think of something, you wimp!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请拿好这张符纸，贴在身上。岁阳短时间内还不能完全支配人的身体，用这纸符可以暂时压住它对你的影响。
t_en: {M#M—Mr.}{F#M—Miss} {NICKNAME}, take this talisman and stick it to your body — it'll temporarily suppress the heliobus's influence...

t_ch: 呜呜……
t_en: *sob*

t_ch: 喂，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，你去，安慰安慰藿藿，这家伙的哭声真是比断断续续的蚊子叫声还招人烦。
t_en: Hey! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}! Say something nice to Huohuo. Her crying is like a mosquito in my ear.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，是你！可、可算是见到活人了！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's you! I—I finally found another living soul!

t_ch: 太好了，呜呜，还以为我会被困在这里逃不出去了…看到你真是太好了！
t_en: I'm so happy! I thought I was gonna be stuck here forever... I'm so happy to see you!

t_ch: 嗨呀，真是过瘾，人类的情绪就像一桌美餐。嘿嘿，品尝悲伤的泪水就像痛饮一瓮美酒~
t_en: Ahhhh, what a feast! Human emotions are simply delicious. Your sorrowful tears are like bottles of potent wine~

t_ch: 别再用我的身体自说自话了。
t_en: Don't you ever talk through me like that again.

t_ch: 关了许久，难得放松一下嘛。你不都把符纸贴上了吗？我现在乖乖的呢。
t_en: Hehe, I'm simply enjoying my freedom. Didn't you use the talisman already? I'm tame as a kitten...

t_ch: 你把小姑娘惹哭了，有意思吗？
t_en: Does it amuse you to make a little girl cry?

t_ch: 要是我在你进餐时问「吃下一堆蛋白质和碳水化合物有意思吗」，你会怎么想？
t_en: Does the Xianzhou sail through the cosmos?

t_ch: 对喜好刺激人类情绪的岁阳来说，这可太有意思了。
t_en: For a heliobus that enjoys provoking your weak human sentiments, I can assure you there is nothing more amusing.

t_ch: 别忘了我们之间的交易，只有我达成了目的，才会从你的身体里离开。
t_en: Now, don't forget about our deal. I will leave only once I've got what I wanted.

t_ch: 我很好奇，附身还没有解除吗？
t_en: Say, are you still possessing me?

t_ch: 当然了，你不会以为你能看见我在这里，就没有附身于你了吧？天真！
t_en: Of course. Surely you don't think I've left you just because you can see me? So naive!

t_ch: （默默离开）
t_en: (Leave quietly)

t_ch: 虽然浮烟说的那些垃圾话夸大其词，但总归伤到她的玻璃心了，你，去安慰她两句吧。
t_en: Cirrus talks nothing but nonsense... but even so, Huohuo has a sensitive heart. You. Go say something nice to the girl.

t_ch: 你不是看不起她吗？
t_en: Aren't you looking down on her all the time?

t_ch: 没错，所以她需要你这样的同类抱团取暖，明白？快去！
t_en: Yes, which is why she needs other organic beings like you to support her! Get it? Go!

t_ch: 要不你也去安慰她两句吧？
t_en: Why don't you go say something nice to her?

t_ch: 要本大爷开金口安慰人？想屁吃。
t_en: Keep dreaming. I have nothing nice to say to anyone.

t_ch: 你能自由移动，也算被封印着？
t_en: You can roam free even though you're sealed?

t_ch: 自由个屁！老子的活动半径就这么点大，你不会管这叫「自由移动」吧？
t_en: Roam free!? Is that what you call this? This is as far as I can get from her.

t_ch: 再说了，老子要是没有被封印在尾巴上，会在这里陪你们过家家？
t_en: You think I'd be here playing house with you numbskulls if I could fly away?

t_ch: （默默离开）
t_en: (Leave quietly)

t_ch: 呜呜呜…呜……
t_en: *sob*

t_ch: 真抱歉，藿藿，你没事吧？
t_en: I'm sorry, Huohuo... Are you okay?

t_ch: 不怪你，都是那个坏家伙在挑拨离间。呜呜呜……
t_en: It's not your fault... It was that bad heliobus making us fight...

t_ch: 你可是判官，振作点。
t_en: Stay strong, Huohuo — you're a judge.

t_ch: …也许在这里的是其他判官你就得救了，怎么会是我呢？
t_en: ...If I were any other judge, you'd already be saved...

t_ch: 虽然明白像{NICKNAME}这样的善良人不会说出这么刻薄的话来，肯定是被那邪魅附身之后才会口无遮拦…但、但那家伙说的每一句话我都没法反驳……
t_en: Someone as nice as you wouldn't say such mean things — only a possession would make you act like that. Still, what the heliobus said was true...

t_ch: 我打小就胆子小脸皮薄…从被尾巴附身起，这辈子就像掉进噩梦里一样…
t_en: I've always been shy and scared... My life's been a nightmare ever since Tail possessed me...
